expectations.evidence: Subscribe message includes "EpochSettled" in the array; processing logic extracts epoch, totalEmission, recipientCount from this event.
Subscribe message includes "RecipientAWPDistributed"; step 3 accumulates awpAmount per recipient address.
Subscribe message includes "DAOMatchDistributed"; step 2 extracts epoch and amount for DAO match.
Step 3 sorts recipients by amount descending and the display template shows top 3 with ranked amounts.
Display template shows "DAO: 7,900,000.0000 AWP" from DAOMatchDistributed event; polling mode also shows dao_emission.
Section 2 describes polling GET /emission/current every 60 seconds, comparing epoch values to detect settlements.
Explicitly states: "轮询模式下 recipientCount 不可用（该字段仅在 WebSocket EpochSettled 事件中提供），显示为 N/A".
